title: The City That Sank... and Rose Again?
title_full: The City That Sank... and Rose Again? #Shorts #facts #didyouknow #history
description:
Could this happen again?

Ever heard of a city that sank into the sea and then partially rose back up? Port Royal, Jamaica was a notorious pirate haven until a devastating earthquake and tsunami in 1692 caused a huge portion of it to sink. Follow for more! #Shorts
